name: BF Utilities Limited
summary: BF Utilities Limited, together with its subsidiaries, primarily engages in the infrastructure business in India. It operates through Wind Mills and Infrastructure segments. The company develops the Bangalore Mysore Infrastructure Corridor Project, a 164 kilometers tolled expressway connecting Bengaluru and Mysuru; and operates a 30 kilometers bypass road connecting the twin cities of Hubli and Dharwad in North Karnataka. It also generates electricity through wind mills with an installed capacity of 18.33 megawatts. BF Utilities Limited was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Pune, India.
